---
name: Success Story / Show & Tell
about: Share your production deployment metrics and migration outcomes
title: 'Success Story: [Your Bot Name/Stack]'
labels: ['success-story', 'show-and-tell']
assignees: ''
---

### Tell us about your bot!
- **What does it do?**
- **What scale does it run at?** (e.g. daily updates, peak updates/second)
- **Target environment:** (e.g. Node.js on Kubernetes, Cloudflare Workers, AWS Lambda)

### The Migration Journey
- **Migrated from:** (Telegraf / grammY / python-telegram-bot / other)
- **Key drivers for migration:** (e.g. session conflicts, telemetry missing, rate limit bugs)

### What changed after adopting TGWrapper?
Describe the improvements in reliability, resource usage, or developer experience. (e.g. "concurrency state errors reduced from x% to 0%", "we can now locate any error within seconds using trace IDs").
